```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.7em;">

  <div class="assistant-card" style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1em 1.1em 1.05em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);text-align:center;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.55em;margin-bottom:0.6em;">
    <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:0.55em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E5F2EE,#C8E6C9);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="message-circle" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;">Assistants</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:0.6em;">One-off tasks.</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;gap:0.4em;width:fit-content;margin:0.1em auto 0;">
    <a class="term-pill term-pill--teal" href="https://chatgpt.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6em;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.28em 0.7em;border-radius:6px;color:#2C8475;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="0.95em" height="0.95em" fill="#10A37F" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-label="OpenAI"><path d="M22.2819 9.8211a5.9847 5.9847 0 0 0-.5157-4.9108 6.0462 6.0462 0 0 0-6.5098-2.9A6.0651 6.0651 0 0 0 4.9807 4.1818a5.9847 5.9847 0 0 0-3.9977 2.9 6.0462 6.0462 0 0 0 .7427 7.0966 5.98 5.98 0 0 0 .511 4.9107 6.051 6.051 0 0 0 6.5146 2.9001A5.9847 5.9847 0 0 0 13.2599 24a6.0557 6.0557 0 0 0 5.7718-4.2058 5.9894 5.9894 0 0 0 3.9977-2.9001 6.0557 6.0557 0 0 0-.7475-7.0729zm-9.022 12.6081a4.4755 4.4755 0 0 1-2.8764-1.0408l.1419-.0804 4.7783-2.7582a.7948.7948 0 0 0 .3927-.6813v-6.7369l2.02 1.1686a.071.071 0 0 1 .038.052v5.5826a4.504 4.504 0 0 1-4.4945 4.4944zm-9.6607-4.1254a4.4708 4.4708 0 0 1-.5346-3.0137l.142.0852 4.783 2.7582a.7712.7712 0 0 0 .7806 0l5.8428-3.3685v2.3324a.0804.0804 0 0 1-.0332.0615L9.74 19.9502a4.4992 4.4992 0 0 1-6.1408-1.6464zM2.3408 7.8956a4.485 4.485 0 0 1 2.3655-1.9728V11.6a.7664.7664 0 0 0 .3879.6765l5.8144 3.3543-2.0201 1.1685a.0757.0757 0 0 1-.071 0l-4.8303-2.7865A4.504 4.504 0 0 1 2.3408 7.872zm16.5963 3.8558L13.1038 8.364 15.1192 7.2a.0757.0757 0 0 1 .071 0l4.8303 2.7913a4.4944 4.4944 0 0 1-.6765 8.1042v-5.6772a.79.79 0 0 0-.407-.667zm2.0107-3.0231l-.142-.0852-4.7735-2.7818a.7759.7759 0 0 0-.7854 0L9.409 9.2297V6.8974a.0662.0662 0 0 1 .0284-.0615l4.8303-2.7866a4.4992 4.4992 0 0 1 6.6802 4.66zM8.3065 12.863l-2.02-1.1638a.0804.0804 0 0 1-.038-.0567V6.0742a4.4992 4.4992 0 0 1 7.3757-3.4537l-.142.0805L8.704 5.459a.7948.7948 0 0 0-.3927.6813zm1.0976-2.3654l2.602-1.4998 2.6069 1.4998v2.9994l-2.5974 1.4997-2.6067-1.4997Z"/></svg><span style="flex:1;text-align:center;">ChatGPT</span></a>
    <a class="term-pill term-pill--teal" href="https://claude.ai" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6em;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.28em 0.7em;border-radius:6px;color:#2C8475;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="0.95em" height="0.95em" fill="#CC785C" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-label="Anthropic"><path d="M17.3041 3.541h-3.6718l6.696 16.918H24Zm-10.6082 0L0 20.459h3.7442l1.3693-3.5527h7.0052l1.3693 3.5528h3.7442L10.5363 3.5409Zm-.3712 10.2232 2.2914-5.9456 2.2914 5.9456Z"/></svg><span style="flex:1;text-align:center;">Claude</span></a>
    <a class="term-pill term-pill--teal" href="https://gemini.google.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6em;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.28em 0.7em;border-radius:6px;color:#2C8475;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="0.95em" height="0.95em" fill="#4285F4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-label="Gemini"><path d="M11.04 19.32Q12 21.51 12 24q0-2.49.93-4.68.96-2.19 2.58-3.81t3.81-2.55Q21.51 12 24 12q-2.49 0-4.68-.93a12.3 12.3 0 0 1-3.81-2.58 12.3 12.3 0 0 1-2.58-3.81Q12 2.49 12 0q0 2.49-.96 4.68-.93 2.19-2.55 3.81a12.3 12.3 0 0 1-3.81 2.58Q2.49 12 0 12q2.49 0 4.68.96 2.19.93 3.81 2.55t2.55 3.81"/></svg><span style="flex:1;text-align:center;">Gemini</span></a>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div class="agent-card" style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1em 1.1em 1.05em;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(196,136,26,0.2);text-align:center;border:1.5px solid #FAE9C8;">
   <div class="agent-badge"><i data-lucide="crown" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:2.2;"></i>Today's focus</div>
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.55em;margin-bottom:0.6em;">
    <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:0.55em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FEF5E7,#FAE9C8);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#C4881A;"><i data-lucide="bot" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;">Agents</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:0.6em;">Full project workflows.</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;gap:0.4em;width:fit-content;margin:0.1em auto 0;">
    <a class="term-pill term-pill--gold" href="https://openai.com/codex/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6em;background:#FEF5E7;padding:0.28em 0.7em;border-radius:6px;color:#C4881A;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="0.95em" height="0.95em" fill="#10A37F" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-label="OpenAI"><path d="M22.2819 9.8211a5.9847 5.9847 0 0 0-.5157-4.9108 6.0462 6.0462 0 0 0-6.5098-2.9A6.0651 6.0651 0 0 0 4.9807 4.1818a5.9847 5.9847 0 0 0-3.9977 2.9 6.0462 6.0462 0 0 0 .7427 7.0966 5.98 5.98 0 0 0 .511 4.9107 6.051 6.051 0 0 0 6.5146 2.9001A5.9847 5.9847 0 0 0 13.2599 24a6.0557 6.0557 0 0 0 5.7718-4.2058 5.9894 5.9894 0 0 0 3.9977-2.9001 6.0557 6.0557 0 0 0-.7475-7.0729zm-9.022 12.6081a4.4755 4.4755 0 0 1-2.8764-1.0408l.1419-.0804 4.7783-2.7582a.7948.7948 0 0 0 .3927-.6813v-6.7369l2.02 1.1686a.071.071 0 0 1 .038.052v5.5826a4.504 4.504 0 0 1-4.4945 4.4944zm-9.6607-4.1254a4.4708 4.4708 0 0 1-.5346-3.0137l.142.0852 4.783 2.7582a.7712.7712 0 0 0 .7806 0l5.8428-3.3685v2.3324a.0804.0804 0 0 1-.0332.0615L9.74 19.9502a4.4992 4.4992 0 0 1-6.1408-1.6464zM2.3408 7.8956a4.485 4.485 0 0 1 2.3655-1.9728V11.6a.7664.7664 0 0 0 .3879.6765l5.8144 3.3543-2.0201 1.1685a.0757.0757 0 0 1-.071 0l-4.8303-2.7865A4.504 4.504 0 0 1 2.3408 7.872zm16.5963 3.8558L13.1038 8.364 15.1192 7.2a.0757.0757 0 0 1 .071 0l4.8303 2.7913a4.4944 4.4944 0 0 1-.6765 8.1042v-5.6772a.79.79 0 0 0-.407-.667zm2.0107-3.0231l-.142-.0852-4.7735-2.7818a.7759.7759 0 0 0-.7854 0L9.409 9.2297V6.8974a.0662.0662 0 0 1 .0284-.0615l4.8303-2.7866a4.4992 4.4992 0 0 1 6.6802 4.66zM8.3065 12.863l-2.02-1.1638a.0804.0804 0 0 1-.038-.0567V6.0742a4.4992 4.4992 0 0 1 7.3757-3.4537l-.142.0805L8.704 5.459a.7948.7948 0 0 0-.3927.6813zm1.0976-2.3654l2.602-1.4998 2.6069 1.4998v2.9994l-2.5974 1.4997-2.6067-1.4997Z"/></svg><span style="flex:1;text-align:center;">Codex</span></a>
    <a class="term-pill term-pill--gold" href="https://claude.com/claude-code" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6em;background:#FEF5E7;padding:0.28em 0.7em;border-radius:6px;color:#C4881A;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="0.95em" height="0.95em" fill="#CC785C" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-label="Anthropic"><path d="M17.3041 3.541h-3.6718l6.696 16.918H24Zm-10.6082 0L0 20.459h3.7442l1.3693-3.5527h7.0052l1.3693 3.5528h3.7442L10.5363 3.5409Zm-.3712 10.2232 2.2914-5.9456 2.2914 5.9456Z"/></svg><span style="flex:1;text-align:center;">Claude Code</span></a>
    <a class="term-pill term-pill--gold" href="https://geminicli.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6em;background:#FEF5E7;padding:0.28em 0.7em;border-radius:6px;color:#C4881A;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="0.95em" height="0.95em" fill="#4285F4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-label="Gemini"><path d="M11.04 19.32Q12 21.51 12 24q0-2.49.93-4.68.96-2.19 2.58-3.81t3.81-2.55Q21.51 12 24 12q-2.49 0-4.68-.93a12.3 12.3 0 0 1-3.81-2.58 12.3 12.3 0 0 1-2.58-3.81Q12 2.49 12 0q0 2.49-.96 4.68-.93 2.19-2.55 3.81a12.3 12.3 0 0 1-3.81 2.58Q2.49 12 0 12q2.49 0 4.68.96 2.19.93 3.81 2.55t2.55 3.81"/></svg><span style="flex:1;text-align:center;">Gemini CLI</span></a>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.7em;margin-top:0.9em;font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;">
  <div style="text-align:center;color:#2C8475;">Daily questions, small tasks,<br>search engine.</div>
  <div style="text-align:center;color:#C4881A;">File editing, continues development, long-term projects.</div>
 </div>

</div>
```
